scope.summary: C6 split extracted the operator action policy and dashboard workbench release-gate helpers from http/operator.rs into a flat sibling module without changing operator route behavior.
out_of_scope: No operator route authentication, CSRF, same-origin, route-scoped action-ticket, or dashboard pairing validation behavior was intentionally changed.
No test files were edited to make the split pass.
No workspace-wide cargo clippy/test gate or hosted CI proof is claimed from this shared checkout.

The source commit also lowered the operator.rs architecture ratchet from 4290 to 4092 lines; the ratchet script is not in the guarded close scope because another pane has an unrelated uncommitted web App.tsx ratchet hunk in that file at close time.

entry_points.name: implementation commit
entry_points.trace: `git show --stat --oneline --no-renames 3745e9c5a9a660261ce7b17809e5df35181d0608` shows http/mod.rs +1, http/operator.rs -206/+6 net split, new http/operator_action_policy.rs +211, and scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh ratchet update. No test file is in the commit.

entry_points.name: scoped compile
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/cod6-core-check cargo check -p oraclemcp-core` exited 0 after the split.

entry_points.name: operator route surface
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/cod6-core-check cargo test -p oraclemcp-core operator -- --nocapture` exited 0: 38 operator tests passed and 656 were filtered; the C3 mTLS operator-subject tests in the same run reported 3 passed. The intentionally synthetic idempotency panic test was caught by the test and passed.

entry_points.name: dashboard origin enforcement
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/cod6-core-check cargo test -p oraclemcp-core dashboard_operator_auth -- --nocapture` exited 0: dashboard_operator_auth_enforces_origin_even_for_authenticated_principals passed.

entry_points.name: browser action policy table
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/cod6-core-check cargo test -p oraclemcp-core every_browser_action_tool_has_an_explicit_release_policy -- --nocapture` exited 0, and `... cargo test -p oraclemcp-core restored_dashboard_read_only_actions_are_allowed_on_execute -- --nocapture` exited 0.

entry_points.name: dashboard release gate
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/cod6-core-check cargo test -p oraclemcp-core dashboard_workbench_ddl_apply_is_release_gated -- --nocapture` exited 0, and `... cargo test -p oraclemcp-core dashboard_structured_ddl_preview_remains_available -- --nocapture` exited 0.

entry_points.name: uniform auth rejection posture
entry_points.trace: `env CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target/cod6-core-check cargo test -p oraclemcp-core c1_negative_tokens_share_one_opaque_challenge -- --nocapture` exited 0, preserving the uniform OAuth negative-token challenge posture.

entry_points.name: format and architecture ratchet
entry_points.trace: `cargo fmt --all -- --check` exited 0. `scripts/oraclemcp_arch_fitness_lint.sh` confirms the operator.rs ratchet was tightened to the measured 4092 lines in the source commit, but the whole lint currently exits 1 because committed HEAD has an unrelated pre-existing violation: crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs has 15703 lines, above measured ratchet 15676.

limitations: The split was proven with targeted oraclemcp-core compile and operator/dashboard/auth tests, not a full workspace gate.
The architecture lint's operator.rs ratchet was tightened in the source commit, but the whole lint is still red on the unrelated dispatch/tests.rs ratchet violation noted in the trace.
The ratchet script has an unrelated uncommitted web App.tsx ratchet edit from another pane at close time; it was not mutated or committed by this close evidence step.

known_defects.description: Architecture fitness lint currently fails on committed dispatch test fixture size: crates/oraclemcp/src/dispatch/tests.rs has 15703 lines, above measured ratchet 15676.
